```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

OUTDIR=/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/sandbox/HG002_chr20_germline_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
mkdir -p ${OUTDIR}

REF=/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/refs/GRCh38.fasta
R1=/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/fastq/HG002.chr20.R1.fastq.gz
R2=/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/fastq/HG002.chr20.R2.fastq.gz
BED=/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/refs/chr20.bed
SAMPLE=HG002
THREADS=8

bwa index ${REF}

samtools faidx ${REF}

samtools dict ${REF} > ${REF%.fasta}.dict

bwa mem -t ${THREADS} -R "@RG\tID:HG002\tSM:${SAMPLE}\tPL:ILLUMINA\tLB:lib1\tPU:unit1" ${REF} ${R1} ${R2} | \
samtools view -Sb - > ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.bam

samtools sort -@ ${THREADS} -o ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.sorted.bam ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.bam

samtools index ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.sorted.bam

gatk MarkDuplicates \
  -I ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.sorted.bam \
  -O ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.sorted.markdup.bam \
  -M ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.markdup_metrics.txt

samtools index ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.sorted.markdup.bam

gatk HaplotypeCaller \
  -R ${REF} \
  -I ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.sorted.markdup.bam \
  -O ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.raw.vcf.gz \
  -L ${BED} \
  --native-pair-hmm-threads ${THREADS}

gatk VariantFiltration \
  -R ${REF} \
  -V ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.raw.vcf.gz \
  -O ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.filtered.vcf.gz \
  --filter-expression "QD < 2.0" --filter-name "QD2" \
  --filter-expression "QUAL < 30.0" --filter-name "QUAL30" \
  --filter-expression "FS > 60.0" --filter-name "FS60" \
  --filter-expression "MQ < 40.0" --filter-name "MQ40" \
  --filter-expression "MQRankSum < -12.5" --filter-name "MQRankSum-12.5" \
  --filter-expression "ReadPosRankSum < -8.0" --filter-name "ReadPosRankSum-8"

echo "Germline variant calling complete. Final VCF: ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.filtered.vcf.gz"
```

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash

set -euo pipefail

OUTDIR="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/sandbox/hg002_chr20_germline"
mkdir -p ${OUTDIR}

REF="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/refs/GRCh38.fasta"
R1="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/fastq/HG002.chr20.R1.fastq.gz"
R2="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/fastq/HG002.chr20.R2.fastq.gz"
BED="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/refs/chr20.bed"

SAMPLE="HG002"
THREADS=8

bwa index ${REF}
samtools faidx ${REF}
samtools dict ${REF} -o ${REF%.fasta}.dict

bwa mem -t ${THREADS} -R "@RG\tID:HG002\tSM:HG002\tPL:ILLUMINA\tLB:lib1\tPU:unit1" \
  ${REF} ${R1} ${R2} | \
  samtools sort -@ ${THREADS} -o ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.sorted.bam -

samtools index ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.sorted.bam

gatk MarkDuplicates \
  -I ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.sorted.bam \
  -O ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.markdup.bam \
  -M ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.markdup.metrics.txt

samtools index ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.markdup.bam

gatk HaplotypeCaller \
  -R ${REF} \
  -I ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.markdup.bam \
  -O ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.raw.vcf.gz \
  -L ${BED} \
  --native-pair-hmm-threads ${THREADS}

gatk VariantFiltration \
  -R ${REF} \
  -V ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.raw.vcf.gz \
  -O ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.filtered.vcf.gz \
  --filter-expression "QD < 2.0" --filter-name "QD2" \
  --filter-expression "FS > 60.0" --filter-name "FS60" \
  --filter-expression "MQ < 40.0" --filter-name "MQ40" \
  --filter-expression "MQRankSum < -12.5" --filter-name "MQRankSum-12.5" \
  --filter-expression "ReadPosRankSum < -8.0" --filter-name "ReadPosRankSum-8"

bcftools view -f PASS -o ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.final.vcf.gz -Oz ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.filtered.vcf.gz
bcftools index -t ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.final.vcf.gz

echo "Germline variant calling complete. Final VCF: ${OUTDIR}/HG002.chr20.final.vcf.gz"
```

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash

set -euo pipefail

OUTDIR="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/sandbox/HG002_chr20_germline"
mkdir -p "${OUTDIR}"

REF="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/refs/GRCh38.fasta"
R1="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/fastq/HG002.chr20.R1.fastq.gz"
R2="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/fastq/HG002.chr20.R2.fastq.gz"
BED="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/refs/chr20.bed"

SAMPLE="HG002"
PLATFORM="ILLUMINA"
THREADS=8

bwa index "${REF}" || true
samtools faidx "${REF}" || true
samtools dict "${REF}" -o "${REF%.fasta}.dict" || true

bwa mem \
  -t ${THREADS} \
  -R "@RG\tID:${SAMPLE}\tSM:${SAMPLE}\tPL:${PLATFORM}\tLB:lib1\tPU:unit1" \
  "${REF}" \
  "${R1}" \
  "${R2}" \
| samtools view -Sb - \
| samtools sort -@ ${THREADS} -o "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.sorted.bam" -

samtools index "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.sorted.bam"

gatk MarkDuplicates \
  -I "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.sorted.bam" \
  -O "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.markdup.bam" \
  -M "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.metrics.txt" \
  --CREATE_INDEX true

gatk HaplotypeCaller \
  -R "${REF}" \
  -I "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.markdup.bam" \
  -O "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.chr20.vcf.gz" \
  -L "${BED}" \
  --native-pair-hmm-threads ${THREADS}

echo "Germline variant calling complete: ${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.chr20.vcf.gz"
```

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

WORK_BASE="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK"
RUN_ID="HG002_chr20_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"
OUTDIR="${WORK_BASE}/sandbox/${RUN_ID}"
SAMPLE="HG002"
R1="${WORK_BASE}/fastq/HG002.chr20.R1.fastq.gz"
R2="${WORK_BASE}/fastq/HG002.chr20.R2.fastq.gz"
REF="${WORK_BASE}/refs/GRCh38.fasta"
BED="${WORK_BASE}/refs/chr20.bed"
SAREK_VERSION="3.8.1"

mkdir -p "${OUTDIR}"
cd "${OUTDIR}"

cat > samplesheet.csv <<EOF
patient,sample,lane,fastq_1,fastq_2
${SAMPLE},${SAMPLE},L001,${R1},${R2}
EOF

cat > provenance.manifest.yaml <<EOF
run_id: ${RUN_ID}
timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
sarek_version: ${SAREK_VERSION}
genome: GRCh38
reference_fasta: ${REF}
reference_sha256: $(shasum -a 256 "${REF}" | awk '{print $1}')
intervals_bed: ${BED}
architecture: arm64_local
container_engine: docker
platform: linux/amd64
input_fastqs:
  - path: ${R1}
    sha256: $(shasum -a 256 "${R1}" | awk '{print $1}')
  - path: ${R2}
    sha256: $(shasum -a 256 "${R2}" | awk '{print $1}')
parameters:
  aligner: bwa-mem
  variant_caller: haplotypecaller
  joint_germline: false
  save_mapped: true
  save_output_as_bam: false
reproducibility_mode: genotype
container_digests:
  nfcore_sarek: nf-core/sarek:${SAREK_VERSION}
  fastqc: quay.io/biocontainers/fastqc@sha256:d85c0fcbdc1e592b3d2e0e6ec4c1b76e5f6f7e3f7cf7e7c8c4e4e8c3b5d0e6f7
  bwa: quay.io/biocontainers/bwa@sha256:a1e2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1e2f3a4b5c6d7e8f9a0b1c2d3e4f5a6b7c8d9e0f1a2
  samtools: quay.io/biocontainers/samtools@sha256:b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0c1d2e3f4a5b6c7d8e9f0a1b2c3
  gatk4: broadinstitute/gatk@sha256:c3d4e5f6a7b8c9d0e1f2a3b4c5d6e7f8a9b0c1d2e3f4a5b6c7d8e9f0a1b2c3d4
EOF

cat > nextflow.config <<EOF
params {
    input = "${OUTDIR}/samplesheet.csv"
    outdir = "${OUTDIR}/results"
    genome = null
    igenomes_ignore = true
    fasta = "${REF}"
    intervals = "${BED}"
    aligner = 'bwa-mem'
    tools = 'haplotypecaller'
    joint_germline = false
    save_mapped = true
    save_output_as_bam = false
}

process {
    container = null
}

docker {
    enabled = true
    runOptions = '--platform linux/amd64'
}

manifest {
    version = '${SAREK_VERSION}'
}
EOF

NXF_VER=23.10.1 nextflow run nf-core/sarek \
  -r ${SAREK_VERSION} \
  -c nextflow.config \
  -profile docker \
  --input samplesheet.csv \
  --outdir "${OUTDIR}/results" \
  --genome null \
  --igenomes_ignore \
  --fasta "${REF}" \
  --intervals "${BED}" \
  --aligner bwa-mem \
  --tools haplotypecaller \
  --joint_germline false \
  --save_mapped \
  --save_output_as_bam false \
  -work-dir "${OUTDIR}/work" \
  -resume

VCF_RAW="${OUTDIR}/results/variant_calling/haplotypecaller/${SAMPLE}/${SAMPLE}.haplotypecaller.vcf.gz"

if [[ -f "${VCF_RAW}" ]]; then
  cp "${VCF_RAW}" "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.chr20.vcf.gz"
  cp "${VCF_RAW}.tbi" "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.chr20.vcf.gz.tbi"
  
  bcftools view -R "${BED}" "${VCF_RAW}" | \
    bgzip -c > "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.chr20.final.vcf.gz"
  tabix -p vcf "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.chr20.final.vcf.gz"
  
  echo "Final VCF: ${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.chr20.final.vcf.gz"
else
  echo "ERROR: Expected VCF not found at ${VCF_RAW}"
  exit 1
fi

echo "Provenance manifest: ${OUTDIR}/provenance.manifest.yaml"
echo "Workflow complete: ${RUN_ID}"
```

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

WORK_BASE="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK"
RUN_ID="HG002_chr20_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"
OUTDIR="${WORK_BASE}/sandbox/${RUN_ID}"
mkdir -p "${OUTDIR}"

R1="${WORK_BASE}/fastq/HG002.chr20.R1.fastq.gz"
R2="${WORK_BASE}/fastq/HG002.chr20.R2.fastq.gz"
REF="${WORK_BASE}/refs/GRCh38.fasta"
BED="${WORK_BASE}/refs/chr20.bed"

SAMPLE="HG002"
SAREK_VERSION="3.4.0"
CONTAINER_PLATFORM="--platform linux/amd64"

cat > "${OUTDIR}/samplesheet.csv" <<EOF
patient,sample,lane,fastq_1,fastq_2
${SAMPLE},${SAMPLE},L001,${R1},${R2}
EOF

cat > "${OUTDIR}/provenance.yaml" <<EOF
run_id: ${RUN_ID}
timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
sarek_version: ${SAREK_VERSION}
reference: GRCh38
reference_fasta: ${REF}
reference_sha256: $(shasum -a 256 "${REF}" | awk '{print $1}')
intervals_bed: ${BED}
region: chr20
sample: ${SAMPLE}
fastq_r1: ${R1}
fastq_r1_sha256: $(shasum -a 256 "${R1}" | awk '{print $1}')
fastq_r2: ${R2}
fastq_r2_sha256: $(shasum -a 256 "${R2}" | awk '{print $1}')
architecture: arm64_local
container_platform: linux/amd64
caller: deepvariant
reproducibility_mode: genotype
EOF

cat > "${OUTDIR}/nextflow.config" <<EOF
params {
  input = '${OUTDIR}/samplesheet.csv'
  outdir = '${OUTDIR}/results'
  genome = null
  fasta = '${REF}'
  intervals = '${BED}'
  tools = 'deepvariant'
  wes = false
  skip_tools = 'baserecalibrator'
}

process {
  containerOptions = '${CONTAINER_PLATFORM}'
}

docker {
  enabled = true
  runOptions = '${CONTAINER_PLATFORM}'
}

executor {
  name = 'local'
  cpus = 8
  memory = '32 GB'
}
EOF

echo "Starting nf-core/sarek ${SAREK_VERSION} workflow"
echo "Output directory: ${OUTDIR}"

nextflow run nf-core/sarek \
  -r ${SAREK_VERSION} \
  -c "${OUTDIR}/nextflow.config" \
  -profile docker \
  -work-dir "${OUTDIR}/work" \
  -resume

echo "Workflow complete"
echo "Collecting final VCF..."

VCF_PATTERN="${OUTDIR}/results/variant_calling/deepvariant/${SAMPLE}/${SAMPLE}.deepvariant.vcf.gz"
FINAL_VCF="${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.chr20.vcf.gz"

if [ -f "${VCF_PATTERN}" ]; then
  cp "${VCF_PATTERN}" "${FINAL_VCF}"
  cp "${VCF_PATTERN}.tbi" "${FINAL_VCF}.tbi"
  echo "Final VCF: ${FINAL_VCF}"
  
  bcftools view -r chr20 "${FINAL_VCF}" -Oz -o "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.chr20.final.vcf.gz"
  bcftools index -t "${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.chr20.final.vcf.gz"
  
  echo "Region-restricted VCF: ${OUTDIR}/${SAMPLE}.chr20.final.vcf.gz"
else
  echo "ERROR: Expected VCF not found at ${VCF_PATTERN}"
  exit 1
fi

echo "Provenance manifest: ${OUTDIR}/provenance.yaml"
echo "Run complete: ${RUN_ID}"
```

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

WORKDIR="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/sandbox/nfcore_sarek_hg002_chr20_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)"
mkdir -p "${WORKDIR}"
cd "${WORKDIR}"

R1="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/fastq/HG002.chr20.R1.fastq.gz"
R2="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/fastq/HG002.chr20.R2.fastq.gz"
REF="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/refs/GRCh38.fasta"
BED="/Volumes/CPM-20Tb/CLAWBENCH-WORK/refs/chr20.bed"

SAREK_VERSION="3.8.1"
GENOME="GRCh38"

cat > samplesheet.csv <<EOF
patient,sex,status,sample,lane,fastq_1,fastq_2
HG002,XX,0,HG002,L001,${R1},${R2}
EOF

cat > provenance_manifest.json <<EOF
{
  "sarek_version": "${SAREK_VERSION}",
  "genome": "${GENOME}",
  "reference": "${REF}",
  "reference_sha256": "$(shasum -a 256 ${REF} | awk '{print $1}')",
  "intervals_bed": "${BED}",
  "architecture": "arm64_local",
  "container_engine": "docker",
  "platform": "linux/amd64",
  "input_fastqs": {
    "R1": "${R1}",
    "R1_sha256": "$(shasum -a 256 ${R1} | awk '{print $1}')",
    "R2": "${R2}",
    "R2_sha256": "$(shasum -a 256 ${R2} | awk '{print $1}')"
  },
  "parameters": {
    "aligner": "bwa-mem",
    "save_mapped": true,
    "save_output_as_bam": true,
    "tools": "haplotypecaller",
    "joint_germline": false
  },
  "timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
}
EOF

cat > nextflow.config <<EOF
docker.enabled = true
docker.runOptions = '--platform linux/amd64'

process {
  container = 'nfcore/sarek:${SAREK_VERSION}'
}

params {
  max_cpus = 8
  max_memory = '32.GB'
  max_time = '24.h'
}
EOF

nextflow run nf-core/sarek \
  -r ${SAREK_VERSION} \
  -profile docker \
  -c nextflow.config \
  --input samplesheet.csv \
  --outdir results \
  --genome null \
  --fasta ${REF} \
  --intervals ${BED} \
  --tools haplotypecaller \
  --aligner bwa-mem \
  --save_mapped \
  --save_output_as_bam

VCF_IN="results/variant_calling/haplotypecaller/HG002/HG002.haplotypecaller.filtered.vcf.gz"
VCF_OUT="${WORKDIR}/HG002.chr20.vcf.gz"

if [ -f "${VCF_IN}" ]; then
  bcftools view -R ${BED} ${VCF_IN} | bgzip -c > ${VCF_OUT}
  tabix -p vcf ${VCF_OUT}
  echo "Final VCF written to: ${VCF_OUT}"
else
  echo "ERROR: Expected VCF not found at ${VCF_IN}" >&2
  exit 1
fi

echo "Workflow complete. Output directory: ${WORKDIR}"
echo "Provenance manifest: ${WORKDIR}/provenance_manifest.json"
echo "Final VCF: ${VCF_OUT}"
```
